title: Option Exercise Agreement
description: Document executed by an option holder to exercise vested options and purchase company stock.
whatsCovered: Exercise notice and total shares being purchased
Strike price calculation and cash payment methods
Lock-up period consent for future IPOs
whenToUse: Use this agreement when an employee or advisor wants to exercise their vested stock options and convert them into common shares.

fields.label: Company Office Address
fields.placeholder: e.g. 100 Innovators Blvd, San Francisco, CA

clauses.heading: OPTION EXERCISE AGREEMENT
clauses.body: This startup agreement (the "Agreement") is entered into as of {effective_date} (the "Effective Date"), by and between {company_name}, located at {company_address} (the "Company"), and the counterparty or stakeholders executing this document below.

clauses.heading: 1. Core Agreement Terms
clauses.body: This agreement sets out the transaction and operational terms for Option Exercise Agreement. The parties agree to coordinate in good faith to complete milestones, share resources, or grant rights as specified.

clauses.heading: 2. Strike Price Payment
clauses.body: Holder {holder_name} exercises {options_exercised} options to buy common stock at the strike price of {strike_price} per share, enclosing full payment.

clauses.heading: 3. Proprietary Information and Secrecy
clauses.body: Both parties agree to treat all financial metrics, corporate plans, cap tables, and research files received during the execution of this Agreement as confidential and proprietary.

clauses.heading: 4. Governing Law
clauses.body: This Agreement shall be governed and interpreted under the laws of the State/Country of {governing_state}.

faq.question: What is the window to exercise options after leaving?
faq.answer: Most startup option plans give departed employees exactly 90 days to exercise vested options before they expire.

faq.question: What is an early-exercise option?
faq.answer: Some plans allow employees to buy unvested shares, starting the capital gains tax clock early (requires an 83b election).
